name: youtube-discord-presence
description: NodeJS version of the YouTubeDiscordPresence desktop component

scripts.compile:mac-arm64: node scripts/precompile.js && npx pkg -t node18-macos-arm64 . -o src/YTDPmac-arm64 && bash scripts/postcompile_mac_arm64.sh
scripts.postversion: echo also update version in `background.js`, `manifest.json`, and when building!

author: Michael Ren
